app_subtitle: Split your ride from the stadium
searching_subtitle: Matching you with fans heading the same way
share_location: Share your live location to find each other
split_ride: One person orders the ride — split 4 ways
blacklisted_message: You are suspended for {hours} hours due to a no-show report
already_in_queue: You're already waiting in a queue
insufficient_stars: You need {amount} ⭐ to find a match
how_to_get_stars: Go to Settings → Telegram Stars → Top Up
history_empty_subtitle: Your ride history will appear here after your first match
refund_issued: Refund of {amount} ⭐ has been issued to your account.
join_group_subtitle: You must be a member of our Telegram community to coordinate rides and access temporary chat topics.
complete_confirm: Are you sure you want to end this ride? The group chat will be permanently deleted.
riding_instructions: Open the group chat to coordinate with your matched crew and share your live location.
